/Library/Developer/CommandLineTools/usr/bin/c++  -arch arm64 -isysroot /Library/Developer/CommandLineTools/SDKs/MacOSX15.1.sdk -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names CMakeFiles/cpu_unittest.dir/test/cpu_unittest.cc.o CMakeFiles/cpu_unittest.dir/src/cpu.c.o CMakeFiles/cpu_unittest.dir/src/memory.c.o -o cpu_unittest  lib/libgtest_main.a lib/libgtest.a
